name: sk-code
description: Smart-routing umbrella skill for application code work — detects stack first (Webflow, React/Next.js, Go) then classifies intent and loads stack-aware resources. Three live stacks: WEBFLOW (Webflow / vanilla animation web), REACT (kerkmeester-style Next.js 14 + vanilla-extract + motion v12 + react-hook-form/zod + react-aria + Untitled UI), GO (gin + sqlc + Postgres + golang-jwt). Cross-stack pairing doc captures the React↔Go API contract. Other stacks fall through to UNKNOWN.
trigger_examples: implement Next.js App Router page with vanilla-extract styling
add a Server Action with zod validation
build a gin handler with sqlc and Postgres
set up JWT auth between Next.js and Go
write a kerkmeester-style React form with motion v12 transitions
create a Go service that pairs with our React frontend
verify Go service builds and tests pass
